scripts.build: npm run copy-dar && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:dar: cd daml && daml build && cd .. && npm run update-package-id && npm run copy-dar
scripts.copy-dar: mkdir -p public && DAR=$(ls -t daml/.daml/dist/*.dar 2>/dev/null | head -1) && [ -n "$DAR" ] && cp "$DAR" public/package.dar || echo 'No DAR file found'
scripts.update-package-id: PKGID=$(daml damlc inspect daml/.daml/dist/*.dar 2>/dev/null | head -1 | awk '{print $2}') && sed -i "s/^PACKAGE_ID = .*/PACKAGE_ID = \"$PKGID\"/" wrangler.toml && echo "Updated PACKAGE_ID to $PKGID"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
